news.summary: Police seen dragging ultra-Orthodox protesters from under a bus after they blocked roads in Jerusalem over conscription.

news.headline: Colombia Presidential Election Heads to a Runoff
news.summary: The candidate, Abelardo de la Espriella, will face a senator from the left-wing party of the departing president, Gustavo Petro, in a June runoff.
